assertions.title: Dashboard login surface loads without server errors

steps.action: Open /login in the assigned browser session and wait for the initial load to settle
steps.expected: The dashboard login surface renders without a 5xx failure
steps.observed: The page stayed on http://dashboard.faworra.localhost:1355/login and rendered the auth entry UI.

steps.action: Inspect the rendered auth entry UI after load
steps.expected: The auth UI becomes actionable for a signed-out guest
steps.observed: The page showed actionable Name, Email, and Password fields plus Sign Up / Sign In controls; Email, Password, and Sign Up controls reported enabled=true.

steps.action: Review console output and network activity for /login and guest session bootstrap
steps.expected: No 5xx render failure, no console errors, and guest bootstrap/session requests succeed
steps.observed: No page errors were reported. Browser network log captured GET /login and GET http://api.faworra.localhost:1355/api/auth/get-session. Browser-context fetch checks returned /login -> 200 text/html and /api/auth/get-session -> 200 with body null.

evidence.network: Browser reload captured GET /login (document) and GET http://api.faworra.localhost:1355/api/auth/get-session (fetch). Additional browser-context GET checks returned /login status 200 and /api/auth/get-session status 200 with guest body null; no 5xx requests were observed.
evidence.renderedState: Auth entry card rendered with Name, Email, Password, Sign Up, and Already have an account? Sign In controls visible and actionable.

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. The guest /login surface rendered successfully, stayed actionable after initial load, showed no page errors, and its guest session bootstrap request succeeded without any observed 5xx failure.
